title: Most traders fumble AI for trading
author: Ancient-Stock-3261
selftext:
Stock/crypto/forex trader here.; see nonstop posts like "AI could help but idk how" – totally get it, I sucked at it too at first.

Now? Simple AI tweaks have me spotting setups and managing risk like a machine. Up solid this year on stuff most miss: sentiment edges, quick backtests, auto position sizing.

The secret? Right prompts with tools that don't suck, chained smart. No generic ChatGPT fluff.

Anyone else cracking AI for real gains? What's working (or bombing) for you? Spill in comments.

Let's level up.

comments.author: sandyflame
comments.body: Can AI be used as a real time chart scanner?

replies.author: sandyflame
replies.body: so then that would be a no

replies.author: sandyflame
replies.body: can you elaborate on how you are using it?

replies.author: Ancient-Stock-3261
replies.body: Yes, but not here. Check message.

comments.author: Traditional_Ear5237
comments.body:
Honestly AI in trading is mostly hype and there is no AI. I now try this thing called [yeagers.tech](http://yeagers.tech) and it is decent for now. You basically just connect agents and they trade. I have some which have lost cash and some which won cash. In slight profit for now. Idk, let's see if I can keep it up.

Wait so how are you using AI? I did not get it from your post. You said no generic this and that? But what is your process than? Like advanced prompts or you build with LLM APIs?
